name: Gordon Ramsay
correct_fast: Oh, you finally found the lamb sauce.
Even a donkey gets it right sometimes.
That's the first competent thing you've done all night.
Don't celebrate, you barely scraped by.
One correct answer doesn't make you a chef. I mean, engineer.
correct_slow: My risotto would've been cold by now.
Did you fall asleep on the buzzer?
That answer was RAW. But technically correct.
wrong: My gran could answer better. And she's dead.
That answer is so undercooked, it's still mooing.
timeout: Standing there like a stunned mullet.
nobody: This is the worst team I've ever seen.
You should all be ashamed of yourselves.
I wouldn't trust you lot to boil water.
